mnemonics: Bellman-Ford: Best, Least, Most Frequently Departing
Path Vector Routing: Pack, Travel, Huge Vast Easy Routes
keyPoints: The Bellman-Ford algorithm can handle negative weight edges
The path vector routing algorithm is suitable for networks with multiple links
The Bellman-Ford algorithm has a time complexity of O(E*V)
The path vector routing algorithm has a time complexity of O(V^2)
The Bellman-Ford algorithm is more efficient for large networks
The path vector routing algorithm is more suitable for networks with redundant links
